name: Awesome MCP ZH
what_it_does: A comprehensive Chinese-language resource guide for the MCP ecosystem, covering MCP clients, servers, and educational content. Includes categorized tables of browser automation, code development, database, and shell tools with technology stack indicators. This is a reference directory, not an MCP server itself.
use_cases: Chinese-speaking developers discovering MCP clients and servers
Comparing MCP client features (Claude Desktop, Cherry Studio, Cursor, etc.)
Learning MCP concepts through Chinese-language educational content
best_when: You are a Chinese-speaking developer looking for well-organized MCP resources including clients, servers, and learning materials.
avoid_when: You need an actual runnable MCP server, or you cannot read Chinese.

auth.notes: No auth required; static reference list.

pricing.notes: Open source curated list on GitHub.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Not applicable; this is a curated list, not software.
known_agent_gotchas: This is a curated directory, not an MCP server
Covers both clients and servers which is more comprehensive than most awesome lists

security_score_components.security_notes: Curated list of Chinese MCP servers. Community resource — quality varies. Vet individual servers before use. Some servers may have limited security documentation.
